subcodes.title: Words to Emogene Hoagg et al, spoken on 1914-01-01
subcodes.first_line: What is known is that a piece of ground was bought specially for the Tomb of Jesus and that is known as Golgotha. When St. Helena went to Jerusalem she tried to have this place discovered. The Jews showed her the place that is now pointed out. They got a good sum for their guidance.
